ui_monitor_add_msg:
**Add New Monitor**
Please follow the steps. Select target channel, optional ping role, and the platform. Then click Next!
ui_edit_wizard_tip_1: Tip: If you leave a menu empty and proceed, the bot will keep the previous setting!
ui_edit_wizard_tip_2: If you want to clear all previous settings (reset), use the Red buttons!
ui_add_wizard_tip_1: Tip: If you proceed without selections, the current channel will be the target and no one will be pinged!

premium_check_lifetime: <:starrating:1495846370932691057> This server has **Lifetime Premium**! All premium features are unlocked forever.
premium_check_inactive:
<:infofilledcircle:1495831063597940998> This server is currently on the **Free Tier**.

**Premium Benefits:**
- 2-5 minute refresh intervals (instead of 15)
- Custom Embed Colors & Alert Templates
- Up to 100 monitors (instead of 3)
- Up to 10 target channels & ping roles per monitor
- Crypto Monitor & Repost feature

*Support the project via Patreon or check our Discord for giveaways to receive a premium code!*

help_desc_intro: Welcome to Nova! This bot helps you stay updated with various feeds directly in Discord. Follow the guide below to understand how the bot works.
help_cmd_monitor_add: • `/monitor add`: Interactive setup for new feeds.
help_cmd_monitor_list: • `/monitor list`: Overview of all configured feeds.
help_cmd_monitor_edit: • `/monitor edit`: Change settings or channel for a feed.
help_cmd_monitor_status: • `/monitor stop/start`: Pause or resume a feed.
help_cmd_monitor_check: • `/monitor check`: Manually fetch the latest item.
help_cmd_monitor_preview: • `/monitor preview`: Preview alert layout and design.
help_cmd_monitor_repost: • `/monitor repost`: Resend past items to the channel.
help_cmd_purge: • `/purge`: Quickly clean up messages from a channel.
help_cmd_setup: • `/setup`: Configure server language and admin role (Wizard).
help_cmd_set_admin: • `/set admin-role`: Change the role that manages the bot.
help_cmd_set_interval: • `/set refresh-interval`: Adjust how often we check feeds.
help_cmd_premium_check: • `/premium check`: Check your current subscription status.
